checkoutSubmittedStep.cartText: You still have open orders in your shopping cart.
checkoutSubmittedStep.checkStatusText: You can monitor the status of your order in your user account.
checkoutSubmittedStep.disclaimerText: The video call will be recorded but the recording will be deleted once identification is complete. The Federal Archives will store only a copy of the identification document, the photograph and the user information in tabular form. You may request information about your stored data at any time (Art. 8 FADP).
checkoutSubmittedStep.thxTextDigi: Thank you for your order. You will receive an offer by e-mail.
checkoutSubmittedStep.thxTextEischtisgesuch: We will forward your request to the office responsible. The processing of requests for access can take up to 4 weeks.
checkoutSubmittedStep.thxTextEischtisgesuchAnmeldenUndIndentif: If your request is approved, you will need to identify yourself in order to consult the documents (see Registration and identification).
checkoutSubmittedStep.thxTextEischtisgesuchIntroduction: Thank you for your request to consult the following documents:
checkoutSubmittedStep.thxTextLesesaal: Thank you for your order. You can consult the requested documents on the selected date in the Reading Room Collections and Archives (Opening hours: Monday to Friday 10 am - 5 pm).
checkoutSubmittedStep.thxTextVerwaltungsausleihe: Thank you for your order. You will receive your documents within one to two working days by post.

simple.intro:
Advanced search

Are you interested in the history of ETH Zurich, are you working on a topic related to the history of science or technology, or do you have ancestors who studied, taught or researched at ETH Zurich? Then the ETH Zurich University Archives is the right place for you.
Search our catalog and directly access scanned or genuine digital documents from the records of ETH Zurich, the ETH Board as well as from personal papers and autographs of scientists related to ETH Zurich. If you have any questions, please do not hesitate to contact us directly at archiv@library.ethz.ch.
simple.title: Simple search

search.standardSearchTeaserText: Start your research with a simple search.
